# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.extensions/v3alpha
kind: EnvoyConfig
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-proxy
spec:
  staticResources:
    listeners:
    - name: api-gateway-listener
      address:
        socketAddress:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          portValue: 80
      filterChain:
        filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
          typedConfig:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
            codecType: HTTP2
            statPrefix: ingress_http
            routeConfig:
              name: api-gateway-route-config
              virtualHosts:
              - name: api-gateway-virtual-host
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                - match:
                    prefix: "/api/users"
                  route:
                    cluster: user-service
                - match:
                    prefix: "/api/products"
                  route:
                    cluster: product-service
            accessLog:
            - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
              typedConfig:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stdout.v3.StdoutAccessLog
            connectionPool:
              maxConnections: 100
              maxPendingRequests: 10
    clusters:
    - name: user-service
      type: LOGICAL
      connectTimeout: 0.5s
      lbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN
      loadAssignment:
        clusterName: user-service
        endpoints:
        - address:
            socketAddress:
              address: user-service.api-gateway.svc.cluster.local
              portValue: 8080
    - name: product-service
      type: LOGICAL
      connectTimeout: 0.5s
      lbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN
      loadAssignment:
        clusterName: product-service
        endpoints:
        - address:
            socketAddress:
              address: product-service.api-gateway.svc.cluster.local
              portValue: 8080
  healthChecks:
    - name: user-service-health-check
      protocol: HTTP
      timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      intervalJitter: 1s
      unhealthyThreshold: 3
      healthyThreshold: 3
      path: "/health"
      serviceId: user-service
    - name: product-service-health-check
      protocol: HTTP
      timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      intervalJitter: 1s
      unhealthyThreshold: 3
      healthyThreshold: 3
      path: "/health"
      serviceId: product-service
```
